title: Refactor ChannelsConfig.all_channel_configs() to derive channel type strings from enum
description: PR #277 review: all_channel_configs() in schema.rs hardcodes channel type strings ("telegram", "discord", etc.) alongside struct field references. Refactor so each config field can derive its type string from ChannelType enum (e.g. via strum/EnumString or a macro), eliminating the string↔field duplication.

title: Implement WhatsApp media upload in send_media
description: WhatsApp outbound send_media is text-only (stub comment says 'to be added'). Implement actual media upload support.

title: Wire Discord interactive button callbacks via dispatch_interaction
description: Discord send_interactive sends components (buttons) but dispatch_interaction is not wired to handle the callbacks. Follow the Slack interaction webhook pattern to process Discord component interactions.

title: Add thread context support to Discord plugin
description: Discord plugin returns None for thread_context(). Implement ChannelThreadContext for DiscordOutbound using serenity's get_messages API to fetch thread history, similar to Slack's conversations.replies implementation.

title: Add per-channel/per-user config overrides to Discord and Telegram
description: Only Slack implements channel_model/user_model overrides on ChannelConfigView. Add the same HashMap-based override pattern to Discord and Telegram configs for model/provider overrides per channel/user.
